creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to peo from comment #0)

> … the "Host not found" error is not confined to FreeBSD …

Your next step might be an upstream bug report – if there's not one already, and if you can provide steps to reproduce. 

<https://github.com/nextcloud/desktop/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+sort%3Aupdated-desc+host+not+found>
